name: medusa-roles-task
description: Responsive Settings > User Roles task (React + Tailwind + shadcn) with a NestJS REST API.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix backend run start:dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix frontend run test:run && npm --prefix backend run test
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix backend install
